untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'tiny candles followed by giant candles' pattern sequencing which requires historical candle size comparison and pattern recognition beyond simple indicator thresholds. The 'important support/resistance levels' identification also requires domain-specific level detection not available in the indicator set. Buffer amount for stop placement is marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no quantifiable value provided.
translation_notes: Approximated breakout conditions using pivot points (S1/R1) as support/resistance proxies and ATR-based candle size detection (small range < ATR, large range > prior range). Actual implementation requires custom pattern detection for tiny-to-giant candle sequence. Stop placement uses recent range low/high via prev_low/prev_high with standard 2% buffer assumption due to AUTHOR_SILENT specification.
